## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Connect wallet '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Brave]
- Wallet: [e.g. MetaMask, MiniPay]
- Network: [e.g. Celo Mainnet]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop, Mobile]

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem — console errors, transaction hashes, wallet addresses involved.
